name: Real Chocolate Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the yeast to a mixing bowl.
2. Mix in the bread flour, sugar, and unsweetened cocoa.
3. Stir in the beaten egg, butter, vanilla extract, and warm milk until well combined.
4. Select white bread setting on your bread machine and press "Start."
5. If using a manual mixer, mix all ingredients together until just combined.
6. After the first kneading cycle, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions.
7. Place each portion in separate small loaf pans and cover.
8. Let the dough rise until doubled in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
9. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake the bread for 35-40 minutes.
